scripts.start-tauri: source $HOME/.cargo/env 2>/dev/null; npm run kill-tauri; (cd sidecar && npx tsx src/agent-runtime.ts) & sleep 1 && (cd sidecar && npx tsx watch src/index.ts) & (cd dashboard && pnpm dev) & tauri dev
scripts.start-tauri-nowatch: source $HOME/.cargo/env 2>/dev/null; npm run kill-tauri; (cd sidecar && npx tsx src/agent-runtime.ts) & sleep 1 && (cd sidecar && npx tsx src/index.ts) & (cd dashboard && pnpm dev) & tauri dev
scripts.kill-tauri: kill $(lsof -ti :3004 -ti :3005 -ti :1420 -ti :7432) 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'tsx.*index' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'tsx.*agent-runtime' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'tauri dev' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'beepbot' 2>/dev/null; rm -f ~/.beepbot-v2/agent-runtime.sock 2>/dev/null; true
